channel.title: Releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 2.2.19 2019-09-08T16:02:10Z Security update: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.4 SA-CORE-2019-008 Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.5 Update Ctools to 3.0.0 Update admin_toolbar to 1.27 Update contact_storage to 1.0-beta10 Update entity to 1.0-rc3 Update entity_embed to 1.0 Update entity_queue to 1.0-beta5 Update lightning_api to 4.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Releases will soon start to appear for Drupal 8 once stable releases are made. Release Created Date Description 2.2.19 2019-09-08T16:02:10Z Security update: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.4 SA-CORE-2019-008 Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.5 Update Ctools to 3.0.0 Update admin_toolbar to 1.27 Update contact_storage to 1.0-beta10 Update entity to 1.0-rc3 Update entity_embed to 1.0 Update entity_queue to 1.
